Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.1434

Title: Extends provisions relating to the establishment of the mercury thermostat collection act
Summary: Extends provisions relating to the establishment of the mercury thermostat collection act to January 1, 2028.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 550 of the laws of 2013 amending the environmental conservation law relating to establishing the mercury thermostat collection act, in relation to the effectiveness thereof
